description: Make free/canonical SAM.gov discovery useful by ensuring a configured SAM.gov procurement source exists with focused persisted filters for industrial automation/control leads, then run/verify the scan path and capture any next code gaps.

comments.text: Updated pilot SAM.gov defaults to include focused industrial keyword filters and a separate broad-software SAM.gov source for software-development leads. Applied PilotSeeds.ensure_defaults to the dev DB; both SAM.gov sources and filters are present. Could not verify/run live SAM scans because Bitwarden-backed SAM.gov credential is pending and this shell has no BW_SESSION/GARDEN_BITWARDEN_SESSION; current shared Bitwarden CLI config dir is owned by the service user.

title: Seed free SAM.gov procurement source filters
